content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

August 7, 1991

Charles A. Szychowski  
4215 Mobley Avenue  
La Sierra, CA 92505

Re: Your Request for Informal Assistance  
Our File No. I-91-340a

Dear Mr. Szychowski:

We are in receipt of your letter dated July 16, 1991, in which you request a copy of the California Code of Regulations.

The regulations which implement the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act")¹ are under Title 2, Division 6, of the California Administrative Code. If you wish to purchase these materials, please address your request to Barclays Law Publishers, 400 Oyster Point Boulevard, Post Office Box 3066, South San Francisco, CA 94080.

Copies of individual regulations may be obtained from the Commission at a cost of 10¢ per page. If you wish to obtain a particular regulation, please contact us. Commission regulations and opinions are also available in most law libraries.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Blanca M. Breeze  
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:BMB:dg

¹ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
